text_original: Though there should be tactics in war, courage is fundamental.
text_normalized: Though there should be tactics in war, courage is fundamental.

text_original: Though there should be ceremonies for mourning, grief is essential Though a scholar should be learned, he must first of all exhibit good conduct.
text_normalized: Though there should be ceremonies for mourning, grief is essential Though a scholar should be learned, he must first of all exhibit good conduct.

text_original: When the seeds are not well sown, there is no use in labouring for a good harvest.
text_normalized: When the seeds are not well sown, there is no use in labouring for a good harvest.

text_original: When the people near-by are not befriended there is no use of endeavouring to attract those at a distance.
text_normalized: When the people near-by are not befriended there is no use of endeavouring to attract those at a distance.

text_original: When one's relatives are not submissive, there is no use in endeavouring to establish contacts with the outside world.
text_normalized: When one's relatives are not submissive, there is no use in endeavouring to establish contacts with the outside world.

text_original: When one cannot accomplish a single task from beginning to end, there is no use of attempting many things.
text_normalized: When one cannot accomplish a single task from beginning to end, there is no use of attempting many things.

text_original: And when one is ignorant of a commonplace that is pointed out, there is no use of pursuing wide knowledge.
text_normalized: And when one is ignorant of a commonplace that is pointed out, there is no use of pursuing wide knowledge.

text_original: Therefore, when the early kings administered the empire, they would investigate what was within reach and attract those at a distance.
text_normalized: Therefore, when the early kings administered the empire, they would investigate what was within reach and attract those at a distance.

text_original: Investigation of a locality by the superior men means its orderly government.
text_normalized: Investigation of a locality by the superior men means its orderly government.

text_original: When they discovered misconduct or depravity, they corrected them-selves.
text_normalized: When they discovered misconduct or depravity, they corrected them-selves.

text_original: Thus all complaints disappeared and conduct became regulated (by itself).
text_normalized: Thus all complaints disappeared and conduct became regulated (by itself).

text_original: When the superior men do not listen to treacherous words or utter any threatening sound, or entertain any idea of injuring somebody, then even if there were underhanded persons they would lose support.
text_normalized: When the superior men do not listen to treacherous words or utter any threatening sound, or entertain any idea of injuring somebody, then even if there were underhanded persons they would lose support.

text_original: Therefore the superior men are daily more energetic in performing their duty, but weaker in their desires, and more stately in their appearance.
text_normalized: Therefore the superior men are daily more energetic in performing their duty, but weaker in their desires, and more stately in their appearance.

text_original: The way of the superior man makes the individual incorruptible in poverty and righteous when wealthy; it makes him love the living and mourn the dead.
text_normalized: The way of the superior man makes the individual incorruptible in poverty and righteous when wealthy; it makes him love the living and mourn the dead.

text_original: These four qualities of conduct cannot be hypocritically embodied in one's personality.
text_normalized: These four qualities of conduct cannot be hypocritically embodied in one's personality.

text_original: There is nothing in his mind that goes beyond love; there is nothing in his behaviour that goes beyond respectfulness, and there is nothing from his mouth that goes beyond gentility.
text_normalized: There is nothing in his mind that goes beyond love; there is nothing in his behaviour that goes beyond respectfulness, and there is nothing from his mouth that goes beyond gentility.

text_original: When one pursues such a way until it pervades his four limbs and permeates his flesh and skin, and until he becomes white-haired and bald-headed without ceasing, one is truly a sage.
text_normalized: When one pursues such a way until it pervades his four limbs and permeates his flesh and skin, and until he becomes white-haired and bald-headed without ceasing, one is truly a sage.

text_original: His wisdom will not be far-reaching whose purpose is not firm.
text_normalized: His wisdom will not be far-reaching whose purpose is not firm.

text_original: His action will not be effective whose promises are not kept.
text_normalized: His action will not be effective whose promises are not kept.

text_original: He who will not share his possessions with others is not worthy to be a friend.
text_normalized: He who will not share his possessions with others is not worthy to be a friend.

text_original: And he who does not stand firm on principles and has neither wide knowledge nor penetrating judgment, is not worthy to be a companion.
text_normalized: And he who does not stand firm on principles and has neither wide knowledge nor penetrating judgment, is not worthy to be a companion.

text_original: Just as a weak trunk will have but small branches, so mere bravery without cultivation will result in dissipation.
text_normalized: Just as a weak trunk will have but small branches, so mere bravery without cultivation will result in dissipation.

text_original: And just as a dirty source will issue in an impure stream, so unfaithful conduct will unfavourably affect one’s fame.
text_normalized: And just as a dirty source will issue in an impure stream, so unfaithful conduct will unfavourably affect one’s fame.

text_original: For, fame does not spring up out of nothing, nor does praise grow by itself.
text_normalized: For, fame does not spring up out of nothing, nor does praise grow by itself.

text_original: Fame follows upon success and is not obtainable by hypocrisy.
text_normalized: Fame follows upon success and is not obtainable by hypocrisy.

text_original: He will not be listened to who talks much but is slow in action, even though he is discerning.
text_normalized: He will not be listened to who talks much but is slow in action, even though he is discerning.

text_original: He will not accomplish anything who is capable but likes to boast of his feats, even though he drudges.
text_normalized: He will not accomplish anything who is capable but likes to boast of his feats, even though he drudges.

text_original: The wise discerns all in his mind but speaks simply, and he is capable but does not boast of his deeds.
text_normalized: The wise discerns all in his mind but speaks simply, and he is capable but does not boast of his deeds.

text_original: And, so, his name is exalted the world over.
text_normalized: And, so, his name is exalted the world over.

text_original: In speech, not quantity but ingenuity, not eloquence but insight, should be cultivated.
text_normalized: In speech, not quantity but ingenuity, not eloquence but insight, should be cultivated.

text_original: If one is not wise and without insight, breeding only dissipation in one's personality, this is just the contrary of what should be cultivated.
text_normalized: If one is not wise and without insight, breeding only dissipation in one's personality, this is just the contrary of what should be cultivated.

text_original: Any virtue that does not spring from the heart will not remain and any (result of) action that is not aimed at by one's self will not stay.
text_normalized: Any virtue that does not spring from the heart will not remain and any (result of) action that is not aimed at by one's self will not stay.

text_original: There is no short cut to fame and there is no trick to praise.
text_normalized: There is no short cut to fame and there is no trick to praise.

text_original: The superior man regards his body but as the vehicle for his character.
text_normalized: The superior man regards his body but as the vehicle for his character.

text_original: Kone who places much importance on personal gains but lightly sacrifices his fame has ever become a gentleman in the world.
text_normalized: Kone who places much importance on personal gains but lightly sacrifices his fame has ever become a gentleman in the world.
